scripts.smoke: npm --prefix real_dev/backend run smoke && npm --prefix real_dev/frontend run smoke
scripts.test:unit: npm --prefix real_dev/backend run test:unit && npm --prefix real_dev/frontend run test:unit
scripts.test:contracts: node --test tests/contracts/*.test.js && npm --prefix real_dev/backend run test:contracts && npm --prefix real_dev/frontend run test:contracts
scripts.test:e2e: node scripts/e2e-environment.mjs && VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3101 npm --prefix real_dev/frontend run build -- --mode test && playwright test --config=playwright.config.js
scripts.test:a11y: VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3199 npm --prefix real_dev/frontend run build -- --mode test && playwright test --config=playwright.a11y.config.js
scripts.test:media:browser: VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3199 npm --prefix real_dev/frontend run build -- --mode test && playwright test --config=playwright.media.config.js
scripts.test:e2e:demo: VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3102 npm --prefix real_dev/frontend run build -- --mode test && node --env-file=real_dev/backend/.env node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test --config=playwright.demo.config.js
scripts.test:e2e:series: node scripts/e2e-environment.mjs && VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3103 npm --prefix real_dev/frontend run build -- --mode test && playwright test --config=playwright.series.config.js
scripts.validate: npm run test:docs && npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:contracts && npm run test:security && VITE_API_BASE_URL=https://api.faithflix.test npm --prefix real_dev/frontend run build && npm run check:media
